requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NRTL Listing Requirement (UL 1741) for Grid-Tied PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——并网光伏逆变器NRTL认证上市要求（UL 1741）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——並網光伏逆變器NRTL認證上市要求（UL 1741）

summary.en: In the United States, grid-tied PV inverters intended for use in workplaces or commercial installations must carry a certification mark from an OSHA-recognized Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) before they may be legally installed. The governing standard is UL 1741 Ed. 3-2021, titled 'Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources'. UL 1741 incorporates anti-islanding and IEEE 1547-2018 interconnection performance requirements. Supplements UL 1741 SA (California Rule 21 grid-support functions) and UL 1741 SB (IEEE 1547-2018 conformance testing) extend these requirements for smart inverter functions. NRTLs recognized for UL 1741 include UL, Intertek (ETL), and CSA Group, among others. The NRTL program is established under 29 CFR Part 1910.7. CE marking and IEC CB Scheme certificates are NOT accepted as substitutes for NRTL listing.
summary.zh: 在美国，用于工作场所或商业设施的并网光伏逆变器在合法安装前必须持有OSHA认可的国家认可检测实验室（NRTL）颁发的认证标志。适用标准为UL 1741第3版（2021年），标题为《用于分布式能源的逆变器、变流器、控制器及互联系统设备》。UL 1741涵盖防孤岛保护及IEEE 1547-2018并网性能要求。补充标准UL 1741 SA（加州Rule 21智能逆变器并网支持功能）和UL 1741 SB（IEEE 1547-2018符合性测试）对智能逆变器功能提出了扩展要求。获认可的NRTL包括UL、Intertek（ETL）和CSA Group等。NRTL计划依据29 CFR第1910.7节建立。CE标志和IEC CB方案证书不被视为NRTL认证的替代。
summary.zht: 在美國，用於工作場所或商業設施的並網光伏逆變器在合法安裝前必須持有OSHA認可的國家認可檢測實驗室（NRTL）頒發的認證標誌。適用標準為UL 1741第3版（2021年），標題為《用於分散式能源的逆變器、變流器、控制器及互聯系統設備》。UL 1741涵蓋防孤島保護及IEEE 1547-2018並網性能要求。補充標準UL 1741 SA（加州Rule 21智能逆變器並網支援功能）和UL 1741 SB（IEEE 1547-2018符合性測試）對智能逆變器功能提出了擴展要求。獲認可的NRTL包括UL、Intertek（ETL）和CSA Group等。NRTL計劃依據29 CFR第1910.7節建立。CE標誌和IEC CB方案證書不被視為NRTL認證的替代。

standards_or_laws: UL 1741 Ed. 3-2021 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources
UL 1741 SA — Supplement for Smart Inverter Functions (California Rule 21)
UL 1741 SB — Supplement for IEEE 1547-2018 Conformance Testing
29 CFR Part 1910.7 — Definition and Requirements for a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory
IEEE 1547-2018 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces

summary.en: In China, the primary national standard for grid-tied PV inverters is GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended, voluntary), which specifies technical requirements including safety, electrical performance, and EMC for grid-connected photovoltaic inverters. Voluntary third-party certification is available via CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CGC (China General Certification Centre). Both CQC and CGC are accredited IECEE National Certification Bodies and CB Testing Laboratories, enabling them to issue CB Scheme certificates against IEC 62109 (IEC 62109-1:2010 and IEC 62109-2:2011), the international safety standard for PV power converters. CB Scheme certificates issued by CQC or CGC are recognised in approximately 54 countries but are not accepted in the US as an alternative to NRTL listing.
summary.zh: 在中国，并网光伏逆变器的主要国家标准为GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性，自愿执行），规定了并网光伏逆变器的安全、电气性能及电磁兼容等技术要求。自愿性第三方认证可通过中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国质量认证中心（CGC）获得。CQC和CGC均为IECEE认可的国家认证机构和CB检测实验室，可依据IEC 62109（IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011）颁发CB方案证书。CQC或CGC颁发的CB方案证书在约54个国家获得认可，但在美国不被视为NRTL认证的替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，並網光伏逆變器的主要國家標準為GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性，自願執行），規定了並網光伏逆變器的安全、電氣性能及電磁兼容等技術要求。自願性第三方認證可通過中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國質量認證中心（CGC）獲得。CQC和CGC均為IECEE認可的國家認證機構和CB檢測實驗室，可依據IEC 62109（IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011）頒發CB方案證書。CQC或CGC頒發的CB方案證書在約54個國家獲得認可，但在美國不被視為NRTL認證的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters (recommended national standard)
IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of Power Converters for Use in Photovoltaic Power Systems — Part 1: General Requirements (via CB Scheme)
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of Power Converters for Use in Photovoltaic Power Systems — Part 2: Particular Requirements for Inverters (via CB Scheme)

gap.en: The US requires NRTL listing to UL 1741 (tested by an OSHA-recognised laboratory under 29 CFR 1910.7). CE marking (EU self-declaration) and CB Scheme certificates (IEC 62109, issued by CQC/CGC) are NOT accepted as substitutes. Chinese manufacturers holding only GB/T 37408-2019 test reports or IEC 62109 CB certificates must additionally engage a US-recognised NRTL (e.g. UL, ETL/Intertek, CSA) to test and certify to UL 1741 before the product may be offered for sale or installation in the US.
gap.zh: 美国要求按照UL 1741进行NRTL认证（由29 CFR 1910.7规定的OSHA认可实验室检测）。CE标志（欧盟自我声明）和CB方案证书（IEC 62109，由CQC/CGC颁发）均不被视为替代。仅持有GB/T 37408-2019测试报告或IEC 62109 CB证书的中国制造商，在美国销售或安装产品前，还须委托美国认可的NRTL（如UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA）按UL 1741进行测试认证。
gap.zht: 美國要求按照UL 1741進行NRTL認證（由29 CFR 1910.7規定的OSHA認可實驗室檢測）。CE標誌（歐盟自我聲明）和CB方案證書（IEC 62109，由CQC/CGC頒發）均不被視為替代。僅持有GB/T 37408-2019測試報告或IEC 62109 CB證書的中國製造商，在美國銷售或安裝產品前，還須委託美國認可的NRTL（如UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA）按UL 1741進行測試認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for workplace/commercial installations under OSHA 29 CFR 1910.7; utilities and AHJs also require NRTL listing as an interconnection condition
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is voluntary (recommended standard); CQC/CGC certification is voluntary

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: A Chinese-manufactured grid-tied PV inverter bearing only GB/T 37408-2019 test reports or a CB Scheme certificate (IEC 62109) would not satisfy the US NRTL listing requirement. NRTL listing to UL 1741 (and UL 1741 SA/SB as applicable to the target market state) is a distinct, mandatory step for the US market that has no direct equivalence pathway from existing Chinese or international certifications. [INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not a certification determination]
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅持有GB/T 37408-2019测试报告或CB方案证书（IEC 62109）的中国产并网光伏逆变器不满足美国NRTL认证上市要求。按照UL 1741（以及适用目标州的UL 1741 SA/SB）获得NRTL认证是进入美国市场的独立、强制步骤，现有中国或国际认证无直接等效路径。【仅供参考，非认证结论】
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅持有GB/T 37408-2019測試報告或CB方案證書（IEC 62109）的中國產並網光伏逆變器不滿足美國NRTL認證上市要求。按照UL 1741（以及適用目標州的UL 1741 SA/SB）獲得NRTL認證是進入美國市場的獨立、強制步驟，現有中國或國際認證無直接等效路徑。【僅供參考，非認證結論】

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Constructional Safety Standard UL 62109-1 (Power Converter Hardware Safety)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——结构安全标准UL 62109-1（电力变换器硬件安全）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——結構安全標準UL 62109-1（電力變換器硬體安全）

summary.en: UL 62109-1 (2014 edition), titled 'Safety of Power Converters for Use in Photovoltaic Power Systems — Part 1: General Requirements', is a US adoption of IEC 62109-1:2010. It establishes minimum constructional and electrical safety requirements for PV power conversion equipment (PCE) operating at up to 1,500 V DC / 1,000 V AC, covering protection against electric shock, energy, fire, and mechanical hazards. In practice, NRTL testing to UL 1741 for grid-tied inverters typically incorporates or references UL 62109-1 safety criteria alongside the interconnection requirements of UL 1741. Both standards are within scope of NRTL recognition (e.g. UL, ETL). Testing to UL 62109-1 alone does not satisfy the NRTL listing requirement for grid-interactive inverters — UL 1741 listing is additionally required.
summary.zh: UL 62109-1（2014年版），标题为《用于光伏发电系统的电力变换器安全第1部分：通用要求》，是对IEC 62109-1:2010的美国采用版本。该标准规定了工作电压不超过1 500 V直流/1 000 V交流的光伏电力变换设备（PCE）的最低结构及电气安全要求，涵盖防电击、能量、火灾及机械危害保护。在实践中，针对并网逆变器的NRTL UL 1741检测通常将UL 62109-1安全准则与UL 1741并网要求结合或引用。单独按照UL 62109-1测试不满足并网逆变器的NRTL认证要求——还须额外获得UL 1741认证。
summary.zht: UL 62109-1（2014年版），標題為《用於光伏發電系統的電力變換器安全第1部分：通用要求》，是對IEC 62109-1:2010的美國採用版本。該標準規定了工作電壓不超過1 500 V直流/1 000 V交流的光伏電力變換設備（PCE）的最低結構及電氣安全要求，涵蓋防電擊、能量、火災及機械危害保護。在實踐中，針對並網逆變器的NRTL UL 1741檢測通常將UL 62109-1安全準則與UL 1741並網要求結合或引用。單獨按照UL 62109-1測試不滿足並網逆變器的NRTL認證要求——還須額外獲得UL 1741認證。

standards_or_laws: UL 62109-1 Ed. 1-2014 — Safety of Power Converters for Use in Photovoltaic Power Systems — Part 1: General Requirements
IEC 62109-1:2010 (basis standard, international)

summary.en: IEC 62109-1:2010 and IEC 62109-2:2011 are the international base documents for UL 62109-1. Chinese manufacturers commonly obtain CB Scheme certificates to IEC 62109-1/-2 through IECEE-accredited bodies such as CQC or CGC. The CB Scheme provides mutual recognition in approximately 54 IECEE member countries; however, it does not constitute NRTL listing and is not accepted by US authorities having jurisdiction (AHJs) or utilities in lieu of NRTL certification. GB/T 37408-2019 addresses overlapping safety topics within a broader technical requirements framework but is not harmonised to IEC 62109.
summary.zh: IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011是UL 62109-1的国际基础文件。中国制造商通常通过IECEE认可机构（如CQC或CGC）获得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB方案证书。CB方案在约54个IECEE成员国提供互认，但不构成NRTL认证，美国有权当局（AHJ）或公用事业单位不接受其作为NRTL认证的替代。GB/T 37408-2019在更广泛的技术要求框架内涉及重叠安全主题，但未与IEC 62109协调。
summary.zht: IEC 62109-1:2010和IEC 62109-2:2011是UL 62109-1的國際基礎文件。中國製造商通常通過IECEE認可機構（如CQC或CGC）獲得IEC 62109-1/-2的CB方案證書。CB方案在約54個IECEE成員國提供互認，但不構成NRTL認證，美國有權當局（AHJ）或公用事業單位不接受其作為NRTL認證的替代。GB/T 37408-2019在更廣泛的技術要求框架內涉及重疊安全主題，但未與IEC 62109協調。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of Power Converters for Use in PV Power Systems — Part 1: General Requirements (CB Scheme, via CQC/CGC)
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of Power Converters for Use in PV Power Systems — Part 2: Particular Requirements for Inverters (CB Scheme)
GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters (partially overlapping, voluntary)

gap.en: UL 62109-1 is the US national adoption of IEC 62109-1, so the technical content is substantially aligned. However, a CB Scheme certificate to IEC 62109-1 issued by a Chinese IECEE body does NOT constitute US NRTL listing under 29 CFR 1910.7. The product must be re-tested or evaluated by an OSHA-recognised NRTL against UL 62109-1 (and UL 1741) to obtain a valid US certification mark. Intertek (ETL) and CSA Group explicitly accept existing CB test reports (no more than 3 years old) as part of NRTL listing applications — upon satisfactory review of the CB test report, certificate, and product sample, they will draft a listing report without full re-testing, at their discretion. UL LLC's policy is similar but handled case-by-case. This data-bridging reduces cost and time but does not eliminate NRTL evaluation; it is not automatic acceptance.
gap.zh: UL 62109-1是IEC 62109-1的美国国家采用版本，技术内容基本一致。然而，由中国IECEE机构颁发的IEC 62109-1 CB方案证书不构成29 CFR 1910.7下的美国NRTL认证。产品必须由OSHA认可的NRTL按照UL 62109-1（及UL 1741）重新测试或评估，方可获得有效的美国认证标志。Intertek（ETL）和CSA Group明确接受现有CB测试报告（3年内有效）作为NRTL认证申请的组成部分——经对CB测试报告、证书和产品样品进行满意审核后，可在其自行裁量下出具认证报告，无需完整重新测试。UL LLC政策类似，逐案处理。此数据桥接路径可降低成本和时间，但并非自动接受，不能免除NRTL评估。
gap.zht: UL 62109-1是IEC 62109-1的美國國家採用版本，技術內容基本一致。然而，由中國IECEE機構頒發的IEC 62109-1 CB方案證書不構成29 CFR 1910.7下的美國NRTL認證。產品必須由OSHA認可的NRTL按照UL 62109-1（及UL 1741）重新測試或評估，方可獲得有效的美國認證標誌。Intertek（ETL）和CSA Group明確接受現有CB測試報告（3年內有效）作為NRTL認證申請的組成部分——經對CB測試報告、證書和產品樣品進行滿意審核後，可在其自行裁量下出具認證報告，無需完整重新測試。UL LLC政策類似，逐案處理。此數據橋接路徑可降低成本和時間，但並非自動接受，不能免除NRTL評估。

mandatory_status.target: UL 62109-1 testing is part of the NRTL evaluation pathway for PV inverters; NRTL listing (which incorporates UL 62109-1 criteria) is mandatory under 29 CFR 1910.7 for workplace electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: IEC 62109-1 CB Scheme certification via CQC/CGC is voluntary; GB/T 37408-2019 is a voluntary recommended standard

compliance_verdict.en: A CB Scheme certificate to IEC 62109-1 held by a Chinese manufacturer does not replace or satisfy the US NRTL listing requirement. Re-engagement with an OSHA-recognised NRTL for UL 62109-1 (and UL 1741) evaluation is required before the product may carry a US NRTL mark. Technical content alignment between IEC 62109-1 and UL 62109-1 may reduce testing burden at the NRTL's discretion, but provides no automatic acceptance. [INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not a certification determination]
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国制造商持有的IEC 62109-1 CB方案证书不能替代或满足美国NRTL认证要求。产品在携带美国NRTL标志之前，须委托OSHA认可的NRTL进行UL 62109-1（及UL 1741）评估。IEC 62109-1与UL 62109-1技术内容一致性可能在NRTL自行裁量下减少测试负担，但不提供自动接受。【仅供参考，非认证结论】
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國製造商持有的IEC 62109-1 CB方案證書不能替代或滿足美國NRTL認證要求。產品在攜帶美國NRTL標誌之前，須委託OSHA認可的NRTL進行UL 62109-1（及UL 1741）評估。IEC 62109-1與UL 62109-1技術內容一致性可能在NRTL自行裁量下減少測試負擔，但不提供自動接受。【僅供參考，非認證結論】

requirement_topic.en: Grid Interconnection Safety — Anti-Islanding and IEEE 1547-2018 Performance Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电网互联安全——防孤岛及IEEE 1547-2018性能要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電網互聯安全——防孤島及IEEE 1547-2018性能要求

summary.en: IEEE 1547-2018 ('Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces') defines performance requirements for grid-tied inverters including anti-islanding protection (mandatory trip within 2 seconds of islanding), voltage and frequency ride-through, reactive power support, and abnormal voltage/frequency response. UL 1741 SB is the conformance test supplement that verifies a product meets IEEE 1547-2018 requirements; many US states (including those adopting ANSI C84.1 voltage ranges) now require UL 1741 SB listing for new grid interconnection applications. Anti-islanding detection is a mandatory safety function: a grid-tied inverter must cease energising the grid within 2 seconds when the utility supply is interrupted, to protect utility workers.
summary.zh: IEEE 1547-2018（《分布式能源资源与相关电力系统接口互联与互操作性标准》）规定了并网逆变器的性能要求，包括防孤岛保护（孤岛后2秒内强制跳闸）、电压和频率穿越、无功功率支持以及异常电压/频率响应。UL 1741 SB是验证产品是否符合IEEE 1547-2018要求的符合性测试补充标准；美国多个州（包括采用ANSI C84.1电压范围的州）现要求新并网申请具备UL 1741 SB认证。防孤岛检测是强制性安全功能：并网逆变器在电网供电中断后2秒内必须停止向电网馈电，以保护电力工作人员安全。
summary.zht: IEEE 1547-2018（《分散式能源資源與相關電力系統介面互聯與互通性標準》）規定了並網逆變器的性能要求，包括防孤島保護（孤島後2秒內強制跳閘）、電壓和頻率穿越、無功功率支援以及異常電壓/頻率響應。UL 1741 SB是驗證產品是否符合IEEE 1547-2018要求的符合性測試補充標準；美國多個州（包括採用ANSI C84.1電壓範圍的州）現要求新並網申請具備UL 1741 SB認證。防孤島檢測是強制性安全功能：並網逆變器在電網供電中斷後2秒內必須停止向電網饋電，以保護電力工作人員安全。

standards_or_laws: IEEE 1547-2018 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces
UL 1741 SB — Supplement for Inverter Testing to IEEE 1547-2018
UL 1741 SA — Supplement for Smart Inverter Functions (California Rule 21, partially aligned with IEEE 1547-2018)

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2019 includes grid interconnection performance requirements for Chinese grid-tied PV inverters, covering active/reactive power control, voltage and frequency operating ranges, and low/high voltage ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) for inverters above certain power thresholds. Anti-islanding (防孤岛) is addressed within GB/T 37408-2019 as a required protection function. The specific voltage and frequency thresholds, ride-through curves, and response time requirements in GB/T 37408-2019 are calibrated to the Chinese grid (380 V / 50 Hz) and differ materially from IEEE 1547-2018 values applicable to the US grid (120/240 V / 60 Hz): under GB/T 37408, frequency operating range is 49.5–50.2 Hz (normal) versus 57–60.5 Hz (Category I trip band, 60 Hz base) in IEEE 1547-2018; anti-islanding detection time is ≤2 s in both regimes but the test circuit and power quality pass criteria differ. Full numerical threshold comparison requires access to both complete standard documents; the directional conclusion (not interchangeable without re-testing) is confirmed.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2019包含中国并网光伏逆变器的电网互联性能要求，涵盖有功/无功功率控制、电压和频率运行范围以及一定功率阈值以上逆变器的低/高电压穿越（LVRT/HVRT）。防孤岛在GB/T 37408-2019中作为必要保护功能加以规定。GB/T 37408-2019中的电压和频率阈值、穿越曲线及响应时间要求针对中国电网（380 V/50 Hz）制定，与适用于美国电网（120/240 V/60 Hz）的IEEE 1547-2018值存在实质性差异：GB/T 37408正常频率运行范围为49.5–50.2 Hz，而IEEE 1547-2018（60 Hz基准I类跳闸带）为57–60.5 Hz；两个体系防孤岛检测时间均为≤2秒，但测试电路和电能质量合格判定准则不同。完整的数字阈值对比需查阅两个完整标准文本；定性结论（不可互换，须重新测试）已确认。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2019包含中國並網光伏逆變器的電網互聯性能要求，涵蓋有功/無功功率控制、電壓和頻率運行範圍以及一定功率閾值以上逆變器的低/高電壓穿越（LVRT/HVRT）。防孤島在GB/T 37408-2019中作為必要保護功能加以規定。GB/T 37408-2019中的電壓和頻率閾值、穿越曲線及響應時間要求針對中國電網（380 V/50 Hz）制定，與適用於美國電網（120/240 V/60 Hz）的IEEE 1547-2018值存在實質性差異：GB/T 37408正常頻率運行範圍為49.5–50.2 Hz，而IEEE 1547-2018（60 Hz基準I類跳閘帶）為57–60.5 Hz；兩個體系防孤島檢測時間均為≤2秒，但測試電路和電能品質合格判定準則不同。完整的數字閾值對比需查閱兩個完整標準文本；定性結論（不可互換，須重新測試）已確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters (voluntary; Chinese grid 50 Hz basis)

gap.en: GB/T 37408-2019 addresses anti-islanding and ride-through but is calibrated to the Chinese 50 Hz / 380 V grid. US utilities and AHJs require compliance with IEEE 1547-2018 (60 Hz / 120–240 V grid), verified via UL 1741 SB (or UL 1741 SA for California). Chinese inverters must be re-configured and re-tested for 60 Hz operation and US grid voltage ranges before UL 1741 SB listing can be obtained. The functional concept of anti-islanding is present in both regimes, but the specific trip thresholds, timing, and ride-through profiles are not interchangeable.
gap.zh: GB/T 37408-2019涉及防孤岛及穿越要求，但针对中国50 Hz/380 V电网进行了校准。美国电力公司及AHJ要求符合IEEE 1547-2018（60 Hz/120-240 V电网），通过UL 1741 SB（或加州UL 1741 SA）进行验证。中国逆变器在获得UL 1741 SB认证前，必须重新配置并按60 Hz操作及美国电网电压范围进行测试。两种体系均包含防孤岛功能概念，但具体跳闸阈值、时序及穿越曲线不能互换。
gap.zht: GB/T 37408-2019涉及防孤島及穿越要求，但針對中國50 Hz/380 V電網進行了校準。美國電力公司及AHJ要求符合IEEE 1547-2018（60 Hz/120-240 V電網），通過UL 1741 SB（或加州UL 1741 SA）進行驗證。中國逆變器在獲得UL 1741 SB認證前，必須重新配置並按60 Hz操作及美國電網電壓範圍進行測試。兩種體系均包含防孤島功能概念，但具體跳閘閾值、時序及穿越曲線不能互換。

mandatory_status.target: IEEE 1547-2018 compliance (verified via UL 1741 SB) increasingly mandatory for new grid interconnection approvals in the US; UL 1741 SA mandatory for California Rule 21
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is voluntary (recommended standard); anti-islanding functions are technically required but enforcement is via utility interconnection agreements

compliance_verdict.en: An inverter compliant with GB/T 37408-2019 anti-islanding and ride-through provisions has addressed the functional concept but does not satisfy US IEEE 1547-2018 / UL 1741 SB requirements, due to differing grid frequency (50 vs 60 Hz), voltage levels, and specific trip thresholds. Hardware and firmware adaptation for the US 60 Hz grid, followed by NRTL testing to UL 1741 SB, is required. [INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not a certification determination]
compliance_verdict.zh: 符合GB/T 37408-2019防孤岛及穿越规定的逆变器已满足功能概念要求，但由于电网频率（50 Hz与60 Hz）、电压等级及具体跳闸阈值不同，不满足美国IEEE 1547-2018/UL 1741 SB要求。需对60 Hz美国电网进行硬件和固件适配，并经NRTL按UL 1741 SB测试。【仅供参考，非认证结论】
compliance_verdict.zht: 符合GB/T 37408-2019防孤島及穿越規定的逆變器已滿足功能概念要求，但由於電網頻率（50 Hz與60 Hz）、電壓等級及具體跳閘閾值不同，不滿足美國IEEE 1547-2018/UL 1741 SB要求。需對60 Hz美國電網進行硬體和韌體適配，並經NRTL按UL 1741 SB測試。【僅供參考，非認證結論】

requirement_topic.en: Market Access — CE / CB Certificate Equivalence and NRTL Acceptance Gap
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——CE/CB证书等效性与NRTL认证缺口
requirement_topic.zht: 市場準入——CE/CB證書等效性與NRTL認證缺口

summary.en: The United States has no mutual recognition agreement (MRA) with the EU or China that allows CE marking or IEC CB Scheme certificates to substitute for NRTL listing under 29 CFR 1910.7. OSHA's NRTL program requires that the specific testing laboratory performing the evaluation hold OSHA recognition for the applicable standard(s) (e.g. UL 1741, UL 62109-1). Products bearing a CE mark or a CB certificate issued outside the US by a non-NRTL body do not satisfy the NEC (NFPA 70) and OSHA requirements that authorities having jurisdiction (AHJs) and utilities enforce as conditions of installation and interconnection approval. No bilateral recognition or equivalence framework between the US and China (or the US and EU for NRTL purposes) has been established as of the access date; US-China trade relations have moved in the opposite direction under Section 301 tariffs and NDAA supply-chain restrictions, making any near-term MRA for this purpose highly unlikely.
summary.zh: 美国与欧盟或中国之间不存在允许CE标志或IEC CB方案证书替代29 CFR 1910.7下NRTL认证的相互认可协议（MRA）。OSHA的NRTL计划要求进行评估的特定检测实验室须持有相关标准（如UL 1741、UL 62109-1）的OSHA认可资格。持有CE标志或由非NRTL机构在美国境外颁发CB证书的产品，不满足有权当局（AHJ）和公用事业单位作为安装及并网批准条件所执行的NEC（NFPA 70）和OSHA要求。截至本文访问日期，美中（或美欧NRTL目的）之间未建立任何双边认可或等效框架；在第301条关税和NDAA供应链限制背景下，美中贸易关系正朝相反方向发展，近期内建立此类MRA的可能性极低。
summary.zht: 美國與歐盟或中國之間不存在允許CE標誌或IEC CB方案證書替代29 CFR 1910.7下NRTL認證的相互認可協議（MRA）。OSHA的NRTL計劃要求進行評估的特定檢測實驗室須持有相關標準（如UL 1741、UL 62109-1）的OSHA認可資格。持有CE標誌或由非NRTL機構在美國境外頒發CB證書的產品，不滿足有權當局（AHJ）和公用事業單位作為安裝及並網批准條件所執行的NEC（NFPA 70）和OSHA要求。截至本文存取日期，美中（或美歐NRTL目的）之間未建立任何雙邊認可或等效框架；在第301條關稅和NDAA供應鏈限制背景下，美中貿易關係正朝相反方向發展，近期內建立此類MRA的可能性極低。

standards_or_laws: 29 CFR Part 1910.7 — Definition and Requirements for a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory
NFPA 70 (NEC) — National Electrical Code (requires listed equipment)
UL 1741 Ed. 3-2021 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers of grid-tied PV inverters typically hold combinations of: (1) GB/T 37408-2019 test reports from accredited Chinese labs, (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 CB certificates from CQC or CGC (IECEE-recognised NCBs/CBTLs), and (3) CE Declaration of Conformity for the EU market. Some also hold voluntary CQC or CGC product certifications. None of these certifications are accepted by US AHJs or utilities in lieu of NRTL listing. The CB Scheme, while internationally recognised in approximately 54 countries, explicitly excludes the United States from its mutual-recognition scope for NRTL-type listing purposes.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器制造商通常持有以下组合：（1）国内认可实验室的GB/T 37408-2019测试报告；（2）CQC或CGC（IECEE认可的NCB/CBTL）颁发的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB方案证书；（3）欧盟市场的CE合格声明。部分制造商还持有CQC或CGC自愿性产品认证。上述认证均不被美国AHJ或公用事业单位接受作为NRTL认证的替代。CB方案虽在约54个国家获得国际认可，但在NRTL型认证目的上明确将美国排除在相互认可范围之外。
summary.zht: 中國並網光伏逆變器製造商通常持有以下組合：（1）國內認可實驗室的GB/T 37408-2019測試報告；（2）CQC或CGC（IECEE認可的NCB/CBTL）頒發的IEC 62109-1/-2 CB方案證書；（3）歐盟市場的CE合格聲明。部分製造商還持有CQC或CGC自願性產品認證。上述認證均不被美國AHJ或公用事業單位接受作為NRTL認證的替代。CB方案雖在約54個國家獲得國際認可，但在NRTL型認證目的上明確將美國排除在相互認可範圍之外。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 (CB Scheme, CQC/CGC)
GB/T 37408-2019 (voluntary Chinese national standard)
Directive 2014/35/EU LVD + CE Declaration of Conformity (EU only, not accepted in US)

gap.en: The core market-access gap: CE marking (EU self-declaration) and IEC CB certificates are not accepted by US AHJs or OSHA as substitutes for NRTL listing. Chinese manufacturers entering the US market must engage an OSHA-recognised NRTL (UL, ETL/Intertek, CSA Group, TÜV Rheinland US, or others on the OSHA NRTL list) to test and certify against UL 1741 (and UL 62109-1 as applicable). This is a separate, additional certification step with no automatic equivalence or fast-track pathway from existing Chinese or international certificates. Lead times and costs should be independently verified with the chosen NRTL.
gap.zh: 核心市场准入差距：CE标志（欧盟自我声明）和IEC CB证书不被美国AHJ或OSHA接受作为NRTL认证替代。进入美国市场的中国制造商必须委托OSHA认可的NRTL（UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA Group、德国莱茵TÜV美国公司或OSHA NRTL名单上的其他机构）按照UL 1741（及适用时UL 62109-1）进行测试认证。这是一个独立的额外认证步骤，现有中国或国际证书不存在自动等效或快速通道。交付周期和费用应向所选NRTL独立核实。
gap.zht: 核心市場準入差距：CE標誌（歐盟自我聲明）和IEC CB證書不被美國AHJ或OSHA接受作為NRTL認證替代。進入美國市場的中國製造商必須委託OSHA認可的NRTL（UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA Group、德國萊茵TÜV美國公司或OSHA NRTL名單上的其他機構）按照UL 1741（及適用時UL 62109-1）進行測試認證。這是一個獨立的額外認證步驟，現有中國或國際證書不存在自動等效或快速通道。交付周期和費用應向所選NRTL獨立核實。

mandatory_status.target: NRTL listing mandatory under 29 CFR 1910.7 for workplace electrical equipment; AHJs enforce NRTL listing under NFPA 70 (NEC) as condition of installation permit
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 voluntary; CQC/CGC certifications voluntary; CE Declaration of Conformity mandatory for EU only

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: CE marking and IEC CB Scheme certificates held by Chinese manufacturers do not satisfy US NRTL listing requirements. NRTL listing to UL 1741 (and UL 62109-1 where applicable) from an OSHA-recognised laboratory is a distinct mandatory requirement for the US market. There is no bilateral recognition framework between the US and China (or the EU) that provides equivalence for this purpose. [INFORMATIONAL ONLY — not a certification determination]
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国制造商持有的CE标志和IEC CB方案证书不满足美国NRTL认证要求。来自OSHA认可实验室的UL 1741（及适用时UL 62109-1）NRTL认证是美国市场的独立强制性要求。美中（或美欧）之间不存在为此目的提供等效认可的双边认可框架。【仅供参考，非认证结论】
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國製造商持有的CE標誌和IEC CB方案證書不滿足美國NRTL認證要求。來自OSHA認可實驗室的UL 1741（及適用時UL 62109-1）NRTL認證是美國市場的獨立強制性要求。美中（或美歐）之間不存在為此目的提供等效認可的雙邊認可框架。【僅供參考，非認證結論】
